title: Skip improvement tickets for golden-covered rejection modes
problem: write_improvement_tickets promotes failure modes like missing_quote_span when fixture MVP runs intentionally reject claims for golden test coverage. ticket-048 was a false-positive promotion of already-implemented validation.
acceptance_criteria: missing_quote_span does not produce an improvement draft when rejections are only from golden-intentional fixture spine.
Run reports still record top_failure_modes for observability.
GT20 and GT21 pass without Ollama.
Operator loop no longer recommends promoting stale draft after ticket-048 rejection.
non_goals: Do not change claim_validator rejection rules.
Do not auto-edit TICKET_QUEUE.md beyond ticket-049 row.
rollback_plan: Revert ticket-049 branch; improvement drafts again include all qualifying failure modes.
